name: profiles/active.sh refuses to set a profile that is not present in the profiles directory
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro profiles && printf 'active_profile: baseline\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/active.sh" --set no-such-profile --state .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml --profiles-dir profiles 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'unknown_profile' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
